message:
test(B10): wave 76 — derive-trait coverage for oneshot, decoding, finalizer, rref_access

11 tests: SendError, RecvError, TryRecvError, RejectReason,
SymbolAcceptResult, BlockStateKind, FinalizerId, FinalizerViolation,
RRefId, RRefAccessViolationKind, RRefAccessViolation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
